sbom.title: SBOM Management requires a paid plan
sbom.description: Upload and manage Software Bills of Materials, scan for vulnerabilities, and track component risks with a Professional plan or higher.

monitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring requires a Business plan
monitoring.description: Get automated vulnerability monitoring and alerts for your products with a Business plan or higher.
